name: Quazies Monster Island
description:
Idk, it just a bot i made made out of boredom..

Maybe not so accurate or uhh.. broken.. but i tried.. its my first bot afterall.

Kaijus: Godzilla, Godzilla Jr, Mothra, Rodan, Anguirus, Baragon, Biollante, SpaceGodzilla, Manda, King Ghidorah, Gigan, Megalon, Gorosaurus, Titanosaurus, Dorat(s), Destoroyah, Mechagodzilla and Hedorah. More to be added soon.

Before someone ask, why Godzilla Jr. here, isn't he like kid or some?

Well, since Godzilla Jr, hatched on Godzilla vs Mechagodzilla II (1993) and then there is MV Godzilla brief appearance, i can assume that in-universe year is around 2014-2019.

So Godzilla Jr is either 21 or 26 years old. This just my take though
creator: W098
